title: Build a todo list Jamstack application
excerpt: title: Build a todo list Jamstack application description: This tutorial explains how to build a todo list application using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this tutorial, you will build a todo list application using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The application data will be stored in [Workers KV](https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/api/).
